name: The Normal Day
short_description: It's a normal day for Mike, until he is abducted. At their world, he will start an exciting adventure, but he still has to be back by 6.
detailed_description: At a glance, The Normal Day may look like your run-of-the-mill 2D RPG game. The reality, however, could not be any further from the truth. The Normal Day is actually an expansive game that encourages you to explore as you defeat your opponents and become the hero of your own universe. Filled with fun, excitement and emotions, all set around a relatable main character who lives in a world not too dissimilar from our own.
about_the_game: At a glance, The Normal Day may look like your run-of-the-mill 2D RPG game. The reality, however, could not be any further from the truth. The Normal Day is actually an expansive game that encourages you to explore as you defeat your opponents and become the hero of your own universe. Filled with fun, excitement and emotions, all set around a relatable main character who lives in a world not too dissimilar from our own.
